channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ukrainian Military Leader Appointed to Reform Soviet-Style Command Culture
item.description: Mykhailo Drapatyi, a decorated Ukrainian officer known for his criticism of the military's traditional command structure, has been appointed commander-in-chief of Ukraine's armed forces. This decision...

item.title: News Corp Australia Implements Measures to Manage Crawler Bot Traffic
item.description: The article discusses News Corp Australia's implementation of software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. Users encountering an error message indicating they've been blocked as a crawler b...

item.title: eThekwini Municipality Struggles with 65% Water Loss and 12,000 Leaks
item.description: The eThekwini Municipality is facing a severe water crisis, with Non-Revenue Water (NRW) reaching 65% in July 2026, indicating significant water losses due to leaks. Over 12,000 leaks have been report...

item.title: Impeachment Trial Dispute: Prosecution and Defense Clash Over Panel Neutrality

item.title: DSS Witness Denies Involvement In Facebook Letter Controversy During Sowore Trial
item.description: A key witness from the Department of State Services (DSS) has denied authoring a letter allegedly sent to Meta Platforms, the parent company of Facebook, during the ongoing trial of human rights activ...

item.title: Sophia Loren's Glamour Captured in 1965 Film 'Lady L' Portraits
item.description: These 30 stunning portraits capture Italian actress Sophia Loren at the peak of her career during the filming of the 1965 romantic comedy ‘Lady L,’ directed by Peter Ustinov. The images highlight her ...

item.title: Labor Party's 50th National Conference Focuses on Green Energy and AI Policy

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford Calls for Unified Response to Trump's Tariff Threats

item.title: Tanzania Insight News Update: July 22, 2026

item.title: Six children fall ill after consuming contaminated cooldrink from local spaza shop

item.title: Study links weight loss medications to increased risk of hair loss
item.description: A comprehensive study has found a potential association between GLP-1 receptor agonist drugs, commonly used for diabetes and obesity treatment, and an elevated risk of alopecia. The research analysed ...

item.title: Africa's Rising Ambitions: WAFCON and the Nigeria-Morocco Gas Pipeline Signal Regional Growth
item.description: The article explores how Africa's development is shifting from reliance on raw material exports to regional integration through initiatives like the Women's Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) and the prop...

item.title: Ebonyi Traditional Council Announces Curfew and Spiritual Cleansing Following Mary Habila's Death
item.description: The Uburu Traditional Rulers Council in Ebonyi State has declared a dawn-to-dusk curfew and initiated a community-wide spiritual cleansing exercise following the controversial death of Mary Habila. Th...

item.title: Steel Company Cooperates With Probe Amid Alleged Violations
item.description: Chuangxing Steel Inc., a Philippine-based steel manufacturing company, has committed to cooperating with an investigation following a raid by the National Bureau of Investigation and police. The plant...

item.title: Dear Passengers: Co-op Action-Adventure Game Teaser Trailer Revealed
item.description: Dear Passengers, the hit action-adventure co-op game developed by Flexus, has released an official teaser trailer for its 'Another Friendslop Game' expansion. The trailer showcases players ensuring pa...

item.title: Mick Jagger Reflects on Aging and Creative Activity
item.description: In a recent interview with The New York Times’ podcast The Interview, The Rolling Stones’ Mick Jagger expressed his views on aging, stating there is 'nothing good' about growing older. The 82-year-old...

item.title: RAF officer Sonia Sehrawat faces criticism over alleged Instagram post amid Cockroach Janta Party protest

item.title: Mwigulu Launches NBC Dodoma Marathon as Thousands Prepare for Event
